completeness_notes: Backfilled retroactively from DB state on 2026-05-13. The pipeline_run this row references was created by the backfill script, not by the actual generation orchestrator. Successful Rapid Desensitization of a Pediatric Multiple Sclerosis Patient with Anaphylaxis to Ocrelizumab
Case Report: Rapid Desensitization to Ocrelizumab for Multiple Sclerosis Is Effective and Safe
Non-late-onset neutropaenia following treatment of multiple sclerosis with ocrelizumab
Breast Carcinoma After Ocrelizumab Therapy in Multiple Sclerosis Patients: A Case Series and Literature Review

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
